title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q2 Earnings Report Preview
text: Marvell Technology, a networking chips designer, reported Q2 earnings. In the previous quarter, Marvell met revenue expectations at $1.16 billion, representing a 12.2% year-over-year decline. The company showed mixed results with improved gross margins offset by rising inventory levels. For the current quarter, analysts project Q2 revenue of $1.25 billion, a 6.5% year-over-year decrease, an improvement from the prior year's 11.6% decline. Adjusted earnings per share are expected at $0.29. Most analysts have reconfirmed their estimates within the past month, suggesting stability in expectations. However, the company has missed Wall Street revenue projections three times over two years. Marvell stock has gained 10.5% over the past month and trades at $69.41 against an average analyst price target of $90.30. The networking chips designer faces mixed results as it reports earnings after market hours. Similar semiconductor companies showed stronger performance: Nova reported 27.8% revenue growth, while FormFactor achieved 26.7% growth.
